name: Björsäter
description: =Allmänt= Ett antal sektorer som ligger utspridda över ett par km. OBS att det pågår jakt i området och många sektorer är därför stängda under jaktsäsongen. Typ Mitten Oktober - 1 Mars. =Access = =Sektorer=

sections.title: Ronjablocken
sections.body: Stängt under jaktsäsongen (mitten Oktober - 1 Mars). Tyvärr är mycket igen mossat men faktum är att många problem håller väldigt hög klass. Bouldrar man grad 5-6 så finns det få ställen som erbjuder så mycket kvalitet som här. Vildvittran, Kapten Nemo, Rödatråden, Lateralus m.fl är topproblemen i denna kategori. Det finns även ett par fina, hårda och ogjorda linjer.

routes.name: Spin off
routes.description: Går på den vänstra sidan av den stora areten på Tjurblocket.

routes.name: Bully
routes.description: Nr 11, Tjurblocket, inga grepp i diedret. Bara areten och vänster om den.

routes.name: Bulle i ugnen
routes.description: Nr 11, Tjurblocket men med grepp i diedret dock ej fotsteg?

routes.name: Apache
routes.description: Som nr 33 på Hästblocket men utan areten.

routes.name: Heel raiser
routes.description: Nr 10, Tjurblocket. Bara hornet i starten. Rakt upp/något höger.

routes.name: Shoreline
routes.description: Nr 10, Tjurblocket. Klättra snett höger mha dålig krimp ute till vänster.

routes.name: Porrhajjen
routes.description: Start i Porrsälen, utsteg i Homohajjen. Endast 'hyllan' på Porrsälen ingår, ej greppen högre upp.

routes.name: Dilemma
routes.description: Vänster om "Spin off". Ej greppen i sprickan till vänster.

routes.name: Sputnik
routes.description: Lättare nu när trädet blåst ned?

routes.name: Nr 4, Byrum plan 2
routes.description: Innehåller allt man kan önska av en 5+

routes.name: Porrsälen direkt
routes.description: Samma start som orginalet men sedan rakt upp längs areten.

routes.name: Sirius
routes.description: Sittstart vid 21.1, sedan utsteg åt höger.

routes.name: Bill
routes.description: 50m in i skogen på v. sida vägen mittemot hygget. Strax innan man kommer fram till stenen med Yggdrasil o.s.v. Det var mossigt så det borde varit ogjort. Ståstart aréten v. sida.

routes.name: Bull
routes.description: 50m in i skogen v. sida mittemot hygget strax innan Yggdrasilstenen. h. om "bill". Rakt upp på överhäng.

routes.name: Här kommer lyckan
routes.description: 20 Norrviken. Rakt upp över bullen. Ej stora greppet långt vänster (off route men ändå).

routes.name: Groove Holmes
routes.description: Nr 39, Norrviken. Landningen består av ett taggtrådsstängsel.

routes.name: En långvarig förlovning
routes.description: Samma start som nr 43 (Norrviken) men dynamiskt rakt upp (vänster om areten).

routes.name: Feter Pan
routes.description: Problemet finns nere vid kraftledningen. Klättra rakt upp genom att slappa båda areterna.

routes.name: Platypus
routes.description: Stora blocket vid grusvägen till Solviksklippan. Sidan mot grusvägen.

routes.name: Sträck på dig
routes.description: Endast greppen nära areten, ej kanten.

routes.name: Hedelmä
routes.description: Grymt morfo. Start på marken (ej på stubbe).

routes.name: Scooby Snacks
routes.description: Vid badplatsen följ strandkanten 200 m och blocket ligger uppe i backen.

routes.name: Balansen mellan det goda och onda
Powerslave
routes.description: På skogsblocket mellan "Sport Chrille" och "Squeeze lika a pig". Rakt upp via lite ond gaston/krimp.

routes.name: Redneck
routes.description: vänster om 1, vit pil. Ej stora greppen på 1.

routes.name: Fetpinchen
routes.description: HH på fetpichen, VH längst ned på slopiga laybacken. Sedan snett vänster.

routes.name: Pragma
routes.description: VH på layback, snett åt höger med HH.

routes.name: Spank
routes.description: Start på låg tydlig list sedan dyno.

routes.name: Farbror Melker
routes.description: Problemet ligger i sektor Jotumheim. Rakt upp, något vänster. Start med bra sidotag för VH.

routes.name: Iron Maiden
routes.description: Stort block vid bilvägen straxt innan Borkhult. Ligger fint i solen om våren. Riktigt hög och fin.

description.text: =General= A number of sectors spread over a couple of kilometres. NOTE: Hunting takes place in the area, so many sectors are closed during the hunting season, roughly from mid-October to 1 March. =Access= =Sectors=

body.text: Do not climb here during the hunting season.
Closed during the hunting season (mid-October – 1 March).
Closed during the hunting season (mid-October – 1 March).
Closed during the hunting season (mid-October – 1 March).
Closed during the hunting season (mid-October – 1 March).
Closed during the hunting season (mid-October – 1 March).

Closed during the hunting season (mid-October – 1 March). Unfortunately, much of it has become overgrown with moss, but many of the problems are in fact excellent. For those climbing grades 5–6, few places offer this much quality. Vildvittran, Kapten Nemo, Rödatråden, Lateralus and others are the standout problems in this grade range. There are also a couple of good, hard unclimbed lines.
Closed during the hunting season (mid-October – 1 March).
Closed during the hunting season (mid-October – 1 March).

description.text: Climbs the left side of the large arete on Tjurblocket.
No. 11, Tjurblocket. No holds in the corner. Only the arete and holds to its left.
No. 11, Tjurblocket, but with holds in the corner, though perhaps not footholds?
Sit start slightly left of "Ungersk dans".
As for No. 33 on Hästblocket, but without the arete.
No. 10, Tjurblocket. Only the horn at the start. Straight up/slightly right.
No. 10, Tjurblocket. Climb diagonally right using a poor crimp out left.
Start in Porrsälen and top out via Homohajjen. Only the 'ledge' on Porrsälen is included, not the holds higher up.
Left of "Spin off". The holds in the crack to the left are excluded.
Sit start on the left by the arete.
Easier now that the tree has blown down?
A massive sandbag or incorrect information?
Loose starting hold!!! Much harder than 6B+...
Everything you could want from a 5+.
Same start as the original, then straight up along the arete.
Follows the arete to the top.
Sit start at 21.1, then top out right.

50m into the woods on the left-hand side of the road, opposite the clear-cut. Just before the boulder with Yggdrasil etc. It was mossy, so it was probably unclimbed. Stand start on the arete on the left-hand side.
50m into the woods on the left, opposite the clear-cut, just before the Yggdrasil boulder. Right of "Bill". Straight up the overhang.
No. 3, Norrviken. Tucked in behind the juniper.
No. 12, Norrviken. New hold => new grade. 6C => 6B.
No. 20, Norrviken. Straight up over the bulge. The large hold far to the left is excluded (off route anyway).
No. 39, Norrviken. The landing consists of a barbed-wire fence.
Same start as No. 43 (Norrviken), then straight up left of the arete.
The problem is down by the power line. Climb straight up between the two aretes.
The large boulder by the gravel road to Solviksklippan. On the side facing the gravel road.
From the bathing spot, follow the shoreline for 200 m; the boulder is up the slope.
A very, very thin seam. Originally 6C.
The edge only at the start.
On Skogsblocket, between "Sport Chrille" and "Squeeze lika a pig". Straight up.
Half sitting on a large sloper.
Start on a low, obvious edge then dyno.
The problem is in the Jotumheim sector. Straight up, trending slightly left.
Large boulder by the road just before Borkhult. Nicely situated in the sun in spring. Really high and excellent.
